    Glossary

    • RK:Ranking
    • P:Games played
    • YC:Yellow cards
    • RC:Red cards
    • PTS:Points

    FIFA World Cup News

    Where does Jude Bellingham's future lie on the pitch?

    Where does Jude Bellingham's future lie on the pitch?
    • 38m

    Scotland vs. Morocco line-ups: World Cup 2026 predicted XIs

    Scotland will be seeking to build on their 1-0 over Haiti -- their first win in a World Cup match since 1990 -- when they take on Morocco at the Boston Stadium but it won't be an easy feat against the AFCON champions.
    • 7m
    • ESPN

    Kaizer Chiefs sign out-of-favour Bafana centre-back Thabo Moloisane

    Fernando da Cruz has the first confirmed addition to his Kaizer Chiefs squad, former Stellenbosch defender Thabo Moloisane.
    • 13m
    • Leonard Solms

    Neymar won't play for Brazil vs. Haiti in race to be fit for World Cup knockout stages

    Neymar will not play or travel with the Brazil team to Philadelphia for their FIFA World Cup Group C match against Haiti, the Brazil federation confirmed on Thursday.
    • 10m
    • ESPN News Services

    World Cup 2026 - updates news as Bafana prepare to face Czechia, Ghana beat Panama

    Bafana Bafana will face Czechia today and will look to follow in the footsteps of the Black Stars and DR Congo.
    • 15m
    • Leonard Solms

    2026 World Cup June 18 schedule: Soccer games today

    What is the World Cup schedule today? Find out more about Thursday's matches.
    • 1h
    • ESPN

    FIFA World Cup LIVE! Follow Czechia vs South Africa in action in group A

    After a fairly disastrous opening match at the FIFA World Cup, losing 2-0 against Mexico and losing two players to red cards, South Africa need to bounce back strongly against Czechia in Atlanta today in their group A clash.
    • 32m
    • Lindsay du Plessis

    Hour 3: Is Cam a fraud?

    Canty reminisces on his Super Bowl parade in New York, and we learn that Producer Cam has never been to a championship parade for any of his teams. Then, we're joined by ESPN Radio's Peter Burns who has some caddying advice, and breaks down the latest with Brendan Sorsby. Also, is LeBron returning to LA the right answer for the Lakers? Plus, ESPN Soccer Analyst Nedum Onuhoa stops by to talk about the World Cup! Learn more about your ad choices. Visit podcastchoices.com/adchoices
    • 2h

    World Cup Daily LIVE: Congo DR fans hit Ronaldo with the 'SIUUU'

    The second round of matches at the 2026 FIFA World Cup is underway today! Enjoy all the features, news, video analysis and color from around the competition.
    • 2h
    • ESPN

    Joe Hart: Harry Kane stuttered penalty 'really difficult' for goalkeepers

    Joe Hart has praised Harry Kane for his stuttering run-up which saw Croatia goalkeeper Dominik Livakovic come off his line early in England's 4-2 win over Croatia.

    • Jamie Barton
